---
DisableTestHistory
RecentChanges: no
Test
---
!define TEST_SYSTEM {slim}
!path target/classes
!path target/lib/*.jar

|import                     |
|org.cc.fitnesse.fixture.web|

!6 Wikipedia
|script       |Web Fixture                                       |
|start Browser|firefox                                           |
|open         |https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Hauptseite|

!6 Suche
|script                                                    |
|gib      |SIGNAL IDUNA       |in|cdx-text-input__input|ein|
|klick    |Suchen                                          |
|pruefe ob|6,5 Milliarden Euro|auf Seite                   |
|stop Browser                                              |
